label: red
groundingNote: one {urn:molecule-v0:color|color} [m]; when people see {urn:molecule-v0:fire|fire} [m], at many times they see it; when something very bad happens to a part of someone's body, at many times something moves out of the body, people see it when they see this something
notes: Color kind via environmental prototypes (fire, blood) — standard NSM color-explication strategy (blood unminted, rendered descriptively).
